entry.title: Exploring AI-Driven Finance Use Cases: Seeking Inputs from Experts
entry.content:
In today’s rapidly evolving business landscape, Finance functions are undergoing a major transformation driven by data, automation, and Artificial Intelligence (AI). As part of the CIS Innovation Incubation team, we are working on building AI-driven use cases to enhance efficiency, improve decision-making, and deliver value to customers and partners.

Why Finance?
Finance plays a critical role in every organization, covering areas such as financial planning, accounts management, risk, compliance, and forecasting. However, many processes still involve manual effort, disconnected systems, and delayed insights.

Our Objective
We are focusing on:

  • Identifying real-world pain points in Finance processes
  • Understanding customer and partner challenges
  • Co-creating impactful AI-driven solutions

Potential Areas of Innovation

  • Automated anomaly detection in financial data
  • Intelligent forecasting using predictive analytics
  • AI-based document processing for invoices and records
  • Conversational assistants for quick insights
  • Real-time risk and compliance monitoring

Collaboration Approach

  • Engaging with Product Managers and Finance teams
  • Conducting discussions to gather inputs and pain points
  • Running initial development in parallel for quick prototyping

Call for Inputs
We would like to hear from the community:

  • What are the key challenges you face in Finance today?
  • Which processes are time-consuming or error-prone?
  • Where do you see the highest potential for AI adoption?

Your inputs will help us build meaningful and scalable solutions.

Next Steps
Based on the feedback, we will prioritize use cases, develop prototypes, and iterate with stakeholders.

Conclusion
AI has the potential to transform Finance from reactive reporting to proactive decision-making. Collaboration will be key to achieving this transformation.

Looking forward to your inputs.

entry.title: Wrong due date calculation
entry.content:
Dear Sir / Madam.

We have created new payment terms as per business requirement.

However, SAP is calculating wrong due date.

Please refer to the document attached which contains the screenshots which explains the same.

 

Warm regards,

Punam

entry.title: Sales Order Costing for Project Case
entry.content:
Please advise related to below case:

Sales Order is assigned WBS as cost object and material should be costed via Sales order costing.
However, company requires to have cost posting instead of inventory during purchase order GR.

We cannot change OBYC setting / requirement class because the same material will be used for normal process.

SO -> CK55 -> PR/PO -> GR (expense)

Is it possible to modify EBAN-KZBWS from M to blank?
or can we remove VBAP-KZBWS from sales order?

entry.title: AM_ASSET - Archiving for a specific asset number
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We are currently configuring the archiving object AM_ASSET due to errors FIN_AA_RECON 795. However, considering that the business requires a retention period of 10 years, not all deactivated assets with this error are eligible for archiving.

Is there a way to perform archiving based on specific asset numbers?

Thank you.

Ana Albuquerque

entry.title: Cost center master data maintenance Fiori
entry.content:
Cost center master data maintenance Fiori

Is there an SAP Standard solution on Maintenance of Cost center master data (single/multiple) in Fiori with workflow approval without using MDG as we're not using MDG.

New cost centers should also be added in an alternative cost center hierarchy.

entry.title: neuer Bewertungsbereich für Versicherungswerte
entry.content:
Guten Tag, können Sie mir bitte helfen zu verstehen, wie der neue Bewertungsbereich für Versicherungswerte angelegt werden muss?

Ich habe jetzt mit allen hier zur Verfügung stehenden Informationen einen Bewertungsbereich erstellt. Dieser bringt den Fehler E006 obwohl ich einen Anlage ohne Wert habe.

Zudem ist mir unklar, wie ich die Versicherungswerte dann von 'migriere' in den neuen Bereich hinein?

Ebenfalls würde ich gerne den Index je Anlagenklasse vorgeben aber das Feld in Transaktion OAYZ ist ausgegraut. 

Gibt es irgendwo eine vernünftige Anleitung?

Vielen Dank im Voraus

S. Horsch

entry.title: Issue with DME file
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We use DME structure to generate payment files and initiate bank transfer for Vendors. During this process, we face a peculiar situation wherein, fields "INSTDAMT" and "CCY" are printed in DMEE file without Space.(gets merged)

This causes our Treasury system to reject the whole payment. Out of 50 individual payments, this happens to 2 payments this time. We ran the reprint of DMEE again but got the same result.

Note that this happened earlier week, but on reprint, the issue was corrected. Find enclosed a word document with screen shots:

DMEE TREE: ZFI_TRAX_PAIN001_DE_INT

- DMEE Tree portion relevant for the Node
- DMEE file with error line items highlighted.

Regards
Uday Kumar

entry.title: FBデータを出力する際、プログラムについて
entry.content:
NOTE:3370503にて、DMEEがS/4HANA2029で無効化され、DMEEXに置き換える必要があるとアナウンスされています。

日本では、FBデータを出力する際、プログラム：RFFOJP_T(日本用支払媒体 国内DME)を使用していますが

DMEEXに置き換える必要はない(DMEE廃止による影響はない)と考えて宜しいでしょうか？

entry.title: BOM Qty not picked in the cost estimate
entry.content: BOM Qty not picked in the cost estimate

entry.title: Unable to add PDF Form against company code US28 and Payment method T
entry.content: Hi Team, In FBZP tcode we have to assign custom payment advice FORM in PDF format while checking in payment method in company code field FORM for the payment medium shows with non-editable option i.e. "SAPscript" there is no option to change format

entry.title: Error: FBV0: No batch input data found for dynpro SAPMF05A 0701. SAPMF05A 0330 expected
entry.content:
Issue Summary

The document is parked successfully in FB01.
As per standard SAP behavior, in a cross‑company code scenario, automatic postings are created for the respective company codes.


During parking, the system resets certain fields.


At the time of posting via FBV0, the document misses mandatory data (SCB Indicator) for Company Code country‑specific requirement).


Due to this, FBV0 posting fails.
Proposed Options


Option 1 – Workaround
Perform FBV0 posting via Batch Input in foreground using SM35.
The system will stop at each screen, allowing validation of mandatory fields.
SCB Indicator can be filled during processing.

Option 2
Create two separate documents, one for each company code, and perform park & post individually.

Option 3 – System Enhancement
Explore enhancement to automatically populate SCB Indicator during posting.

entry.title: FAGLB03 Default Variant is not defaulting
entry.content:
User is running into an issue where their default layout for FAGLB03 is changing based on the last variant chosen when running FAGLL03.
User reports using a specific variant each day for a revenue process that is completed in T-code FAGLL03.
When user runs T-code FAGLB03, the last variant layout from t-code FAGLL03 comes over by default. We checked their default layout in FAGLB03, and it says that it is set to 1SAP, but it is not defaulting to that layout.
Please see attached testing document for examples of this occurring.

entry.title: OAAQ highest physical year need to reduce from 2026 to 2025
entry.content:
Dear Support,

We posted document number 3000000011 using transaction AFABN in 2024, but the relevant period is now closed. Currently, we have identified an issue with a missing profit center in this document. To resolve this, we need to reverse the document and repost it with the correct profit center assignment.

Could you please suggest the correction?

entry.title: S4 FBWE Download Path not clear / no documentation
entry.content:
Hello,

after upgrading to S4 HANA the download path in FDTA cannot be change in S4.

In ERP its not a problem at all.

Pls. see attachment

Regards

entry.title: The line item violates the cutoff value of -12.40 in area 01 Message No. AA632
entry.content:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Getting below error while settling WBS DR901-000002-11 in CJ88 

The line item violates the cut off value of -12.40 in area 01

Message No. AA632

PL. see the attachment and suggest the solution as our connection is already opened..

Regards,

Dr. Dharmveer Vishwakarma

Cell-9903327581

When we are posting the Unplanned Depreciation through T-Code- ABAA, System is giving us the Error message and not allowing us to post the Depreciation. Screenshot is attached in the File.

entry.title: System is not allowing us to post the Unplanned Depreciation.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

When we are posting the Unplanned Depreciation through T-Code- ABAA, System is giving us the Error message and not allowing us to post the Depreciation. Screenshot is attached in the File.

entry.title: Unable to post transaction through post capitalization
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,Business requirement as per below.

  1. Need to create asset with post capitalization
  2. Capitalization date is 23.03.2026
  3. Asset put to used date is in previous fiscal year.

But we are getting error while creating asset & posting of asset please refer attached document for referaance.

entry.title: FIORI for DP90 (contract billing) in S/4 HANA service
entry.content:
Will FIORI like DP90 selection screen available in S/4 PERSON_NAME service to do the billing based on contract sales order?

If not then will there be any SAP FIORI app available in S/4 PERSON_NAME service that can provide an option to input contract sales order number on selection screen to  fetch the cost of all associated service order(linked to contract sales order)?

  


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ACDOCA_M_EXTRACT vs MBEW
entry.content:
Can we use the ACDOCA_M_EXTRACT to get the price of a product for a stock report.
We are using materials with
batch specific unit of measure (FERT),
with batch valuation (FERT),
without batch valuation (HALB, ROH),
With batch (FERT),
without batch (ROH),
project stock,
normal stock,
sales order stock.
Is it good to take the perunit price of a product from this report using the current period (999.9999 - FISCYEARPER). Or if its MBEW then how to consider all the stock table and scenarios to pick the stock

  • MARD: Storage Location Data for Material (current stock, e.g., LABST).
  • MCHB: Batch Stocks (Batch-managed materials).
  • MSPR/MSSQ: Project Stock / Total Project Stock
  • MSKA/MSSA: Sales Order Stock / Total Sales Order Stock
  • MSLB/MSSL: Special Stocks with Vendor / Total Special Stocks with Vendor
  • MSKU: Special Stocks with Customer (Consignment/Returnable Package)
  • MKOL: Special Stocks from Vendor (Consignment)
  • MSCA: Sales Orders on Hand with Vendor 
  • MSTB: Stock in Transit
  • MSTE: Stock in Transit Sales Order
  • MSTQ: Stock in Transit Project
Is it need to fetch values from all the belwo Valuation Tables ?
  • EBEW: Sales Order Stock Valuation
  • QBEW: Project Stock Valuation
  • OBEW: Valuated Stock with Subcontractor
  • MBEW: Material Valuation (Standard)
